problem: After fail-closed RV guards, the pipeline still emits frequent FULL_REFRESH artifacts while data quality remains failed, producing repeated non-actionable outputs and potential downstream alert churn. In the latest run window, many artifacts have `data_quality_status=DATA_QUALITY_FAIL` but continue publishing full metric payloads every cycle.

evidence.risk: Any downstream consumer that keys off FULL_REFRESH or headline metrics (instead of gate fields) can over-notify or mis-rank candidates during prolonged feed outages.

required_change: Add a data-quality fail dedupe circuit breaker in options-MC artifact publication.

When the same `data_quality_status` reason persists and canonical inputs are unchanged within a configurable cooldown (default 30m), return `status=NO_ACTION_DQ_FAIL_DUPLICATE` and suppress full metric/brief regeneration.
Always emit a compact machine-readable heartbeat payload in dedupe mode: `generated_at`, `status`, `data_quality_status`, `dedupe_window_seconds`, `prior_artifact`.
Bypass dedupe and force FULL_REFRESH when any of these change: data-quality reason, canonical inputs hash, cooldown expiry, or manual force-refresh flag.
acceptance_tests: Unit test: same DQ fail reason + unchanged canonical inputs + within cooldown => `status=NO_ACTION_DQ_FAIL_DUPLICATE`, no full metrics section, and `prior_artifact` populated.
Unit test: same DQ fail reason + cooldown elapsed => FULL_REFRESH allowed and `options_mc_runs_dq_fail_republished_after_cooldown` increments.
Unit test: DQ reason transition (e.g., missing_realized_vol -> stale_realized_vol or -> OK) bypasses dedupe and publishes FULL_REFRESH once.
Unit test: canonical_inputs_hash change bypasses dedupe even if DQ reason unchanged.
Integration test: replay a prolonged stale-RV fixture loop and verify dedupe reduces repeated full publications while preserving first-failure and state-transition visibility.
constraints: Do not relax fail-closed safety gates (`allow_trade` must remain false on DQ fail).
Keep artifact schema backward compatible with additive fields and new status enum.
Deduping must not hide state transitions or first occurrence of new failure reasons.
